title: Windfall
description: Official Mod Pack For the windfall server
body: HIGH IRON is a Minecraft server that places great emphasis on the construction of a large-scale city, offering a diverse range of transit options. The server is inclusive, catering to players of all skill levels, and provides a multitude of engaging activities for both seasoned builders and novices alike. In addition to trains, HIGH IRON offers a plethora of other transit options, such as buses, subways, and planes, which players can utilize to effortlessly and efficiently navigate the city. The primary objective of HIGH IRON is to create a visually appealing and fully functional metropolis. The server's dedicated staff continuously work towards enhancing existing features and introducing new ones. They also highly value player feedback, encouraging suggestions for improving the city. If you are in search of a Minecraft server where you can construct, explore, and ride transit within a vibrant city alongside other players, HIGH IRON is the perfect choice for you. Join the community and contribute to the realization of your dream city!
